alert_thresholds.name: Moderate
alert_thresholds.description: No alert generated — heightened awareness only

alert_thresholds.name: Considerable
alert_thresholds.description: Alert drafted, requires human review before dispatch

escalation_rules.description: Two or more avalanche problems on same aspect/elevation
Danger level increased by 2+ in 24 hours
Missing data from any source for 12+ hours
